content:
G'day all, there was a breaking change recently that landed in main relating to the ABI for Roc Str and List representations. I've updated the Zig and Rust platform templates and cut a new release so you can continue to use these if you like.

https://github.com/lukewilliamboswell/roc-platform-template-zig/releases/tag/0.7
https://github.com/lukewilliamboswell/roc-platform-template-rust/releases/tag/0.2

Please let me know if you find any issues that are platform specific.
